data.body:
The great thing about the Hindenburg is that it uses hydrogen for buoyancy. 

And everyone knows if you burn hydrogen you get water. 

So in the highly unlikely event of a fire it'll put itself out.

We've also made the outside skin out of solid rocket fuel just in case we need a turbo boost.
